name: opengit
description: P2P-native code forge on the Pear/Bare/Holepunch stack

scripts.preview: node scripts/build-site.js && node scripts/preview-webapp.js && node scripts/serve-local.js --dir .preview --port 8088
scripts.deploy:cf: node scripts/build-forge.js && npx --yes wrangler@latest pages deploy dist --project-name opengit-forge --commit-dirty=true
